zh.Bashall Eaves, Mitton, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯
zh.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Talbot於大約1336年出生在英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯時，她的父親Sir Thomas Talbot II30歲，母親Elizabeth Bellard26歲。她於大約1355年與Sir Richard VI Tempest在英國越可爾布拉可維爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Bashall Eaves, Mitton, Yorkshire, Englan: 英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯
zh-hans.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾布拉可維爾
zh-hans.Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Talbot于大约1336年出生在英国越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Talbot II30岁，母亲Elizabeth Bellard26岁。她于大约1355年与Sir Richard VI Tempest在英国越可爾布拉可維爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Talbot was born about 1336, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Talbot II, was 30 and her mother, Elizabeth Bellard, was 26. She married Sir Richard VI Tempest about 1355, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Talbot est née environ 1336, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Talbot II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bellard, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard VI Tempest environ 1355, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Talbot um 1336 in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Talbot II 30 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Bellard 26. Sie hat um 1355 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England Sir Richard VI Tempest geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Talbot è nata il circa 1336 nel Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Talbot II, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Bellard, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard VI Tempest circa 1355, nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.Bashall Eaves, Mitton, Yorkshire, Englan: イギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベス
ja.Bracewell, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエル
ja.Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベス
ja.lifeSummary: Mary Talbotが約1336年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Talbot IIは30歳，母Elizabeth Bellardは26歳であった。約1355年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルでSir Richard VI Tempestと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Talbot(이)가 대략 1336년 영국 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Talbot II(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Bellard(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1355년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 Sir Richard VI Tempest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Talbot nasceu aproximadamente 1336, em Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Talbot II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bellard, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard VI Tempest aproximadamente 1355, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Talbot родилась около 1336 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Talbot II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bellard, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard VI Tempest около 1355 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Talbot nació aproximadamente 1336, en Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Talbot II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bellard, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Richard VI Tempest aproximadamente 1355, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
